name: VACCINEX, INC.
business: Vaccinex is a clinical-stage biotechnology company engaged in the discovery and development of targeted biotherapeutics to treat serious diseases with unmet medical needs, including neurodegenerative diseases, cancer, and autoimmune disorders. Its lead product candidate is pepinemab, an antibody targeting SEMA4D, currently in clinical development for Alzheimer's disease, head and neck cancer, and pancreatic cancer.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company engaged in the discovery and development of targeted biotherapeutics to treat serious diseases and conditions with unmet medical needs, including neurodegenerative diseases, cancer, and autoimmune disorders.

catalysts.event: topline data from SIGNAL-AD phase 1b/2 study of pepinemab for Alzheimer's disease reported
catalysts.sentence: SIGNAL-AD topline data was reported by Eric Siemers, MD, Principal Investigator of the SIGNAL-AD trial at the Alzheimer's Association International Conference in Philadelphia on July 31, 2024.

catalysts.event: additional efficacy data for SIGNAL-AD reported
catalysts.sentence: Additional efficacy data for SIGNAL-AD was reported by Elizabeth Evans, PhD, Senior VP Discovery and Translational Research and Chief Operating Officer on October 31, 2024, at the Clinical Trials on Alzheimer's Disease Conference in Madrid, Spain.
